texto: Within moments she stood naked before him,aside from her garters and stockings."Why is it that ye always strip me bare but leave these things on?" she asked absently as he stepped back to work at his own clothing."To give you something to complain about?" he said with a big grin.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lydia Dare que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Within moments she stood naked before him,aside from her garters and stockings."Why is it that ye…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, dash-and-cait, lydia-dare, com foco em trabalho e lydia-dare.
